channel.title: Sample National Feed
channel.description: Fixture feed for Parakh ingestion tests

item.title: Centre notifies data protection rules & seeks industry input
item.description: The government notified the long-awaited rules on Friday. Industry bodies have sought a six-month transition window to comply, citing the scale of changes required across data-handling systems, consent flows, grievance redressal, and cross-border transfer obligations that many mid-sized firms are not yet equipped to meet in the current timeline.

item.title: डेटा संरक्षण नियम अधिसूचित, उद्योग ने छह महीने का समय मांगा
item.description: सरकार ने शुक्रवार को नियम अधिसूचित किए।
